nmaprun.args: /usr/lib/nmap/nmap --privileged -vv --reason -Pn -T4 -sV -p 7990 "--script=banner,(http* or ssl*) and not (brute or broadcast or dos or external or http-slowloris* or fuzzer)" -oN "/home/noah/Desktop/New Folder/obsidian-OSCP/OSCP-Obs/Notion/THM/Enterprise/results/10.114.191.140/scans/tcp7990/tcp_7990_http_nmap.txt" -oX "/home/noah/Desktop/New Folder/obsidian-OSCP/OSCP-Obs/Notion/THM/Enterprise/results/10.114.191.140/scans/tcp7990/xml/tcp_7990_http_nmap.xml" 10.114.191.140
